version_description: Complete chords and lyrics / intermediate with suggestions for voicings in Drop D and Standard tuning / basic tabs for chorus riff.
tuning: D A D G B E
content:
Fleetwood Mac - Tusk
Lindsey Buckingham
Album – Tusk (1979)

Capo: 5th fret
Play: Dm
Key: Gm

For chords in original key, tranpsose +5 (and "use flats")

       D-A-D-G-B-e    E-A-D-G-B-e

E5     2-2-2-4-5-x    0-2-2-3-4-x
G/A    x-0-0-0-0-x    x-0-0-0-0-x[/tab]
